channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Robotics
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Robotics" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Building intelligent physical AI: From edge to cloud with Strands Agents, Bedrock AgentCore, Claude 4.5, NVIDIA GR00T, and Hugging Face LeRobot
item.description: Learn how to build physical AI systems that combine edge computing with cloud intelligence using Strands Agents, NVIDIA GR00T, and Hugging Face LeRobot.
